source: user request 2026-05-08 — 'every week we achive real deal'
title: scripts/plan_sprint.py — weekly sprint planning ritual
what_failed: No structured way to set the week's goal + ticket selection. PI.md §3 (this week's sprint) needed a writer.
suggested_fix: Interactive script that loads open tickets sorted by severity, prompts for sprint goal + tickets (or auto-picks top N), writes them into PI.md §3 between the §3 and §4 headers, and snapshots to vault/notes/sprints/YYYY-Www.md.
fix_applied: Wrote scripts/plan_sprint.py with both interactive (default) and --auto modes. Supports --goal and --tickets flags for non-interactive use. Replaces only the §3 section in PI.md (regex between §3 header and §4 header). Vault snapshot includes goal + tickets + components + what_failed extracts.
tests: Covered by testing/test_plan_sprint_and_retro.py — 7 plan_sprint tests covering iso_week_label, week_range, render_section_3, replace_section_3, write_vault_snapshot, escalated-ticket filtering, and severity sorting.
